title: Unity Academy Blackpool (Lancashire): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Unity Academy Blackpool  URN: 139675  Notice issued to: Fylde Coast Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Blackpool Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
